reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y excelente los huevos del playero soportando a una pareja de adultos mayores que lo maltrataban por una supuesta manchita en el espejo retrovisor. La señora se bajó y agarró ella misma el limpiador y comenzó a hacer la tarea. Una ridicula y maleducada.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, and the attendant had the guts to put up with an elderly couple who were verbally abusing him over a supposed stain on the rearview mirror. The woman got out of the car, grabbed the cleaning cloth herself, and started cleaning it. Ridiculous and rude.
